summary: A solid show with a great recording makes this release an enjoyable listen.
review: The reviewer rates the set four stars, praising both the performance and the audio quality. No specific song or technical issues are mentioned, but the overall impression is that the recording captures a strong setlist well.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, giving 4 stars and highlighting both good sound and a solid song list.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "great" and notes no problems.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The song list is described as strong; reviewer recommends listening.
